text_blocks.text: generally travels with a primary female companion,
who occupies a larger narrative role. Steven Moffat
described the companion as the main character of the
show, as the story begins knew with each companion
and she undergoes more change than the Doctor. The
primary companions of the Ninth and Tenth Doctors
were Rose Tyler (Billie Piper), Martha Jones
Tate) with Mickey Smith (Noel Clarke) and Jack
companion figures. The Eleventh Doctor became the
first to travel with a married couple, Amy Pond
Darvill), whilst out-of-sync meetings with River Song
Coleman) provided ongoing story arcs. The tenth
